query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A heavily abstracted image dominated by broad fields of color including deep blue in the upper left, dark tones in the central and right portions, and a large swath of green extending across the lower region. Faint suggestions of vertical forms appear on the right side, with a pale oval-shaped area near the upper right hinting at a face-like form. The entire composition consists of soft, indistinct color transitions without sharp edges or recognizable subjects.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily abstracted image dominated by broad fields of color including deep blue in the upper left, dark tones in the central and right portions, and a large swath of green extending across the lower region. The image is rendered with extreme, deliberate blur throughout, causing all forms to dissolve into soft color transitions with no discernible detail or texture. Faint suggestions of vertical forms appear on the right side, with a pale oval-shaped area near the upper right hinting at a face-like form, but the lack of resolution renders everything ambiguous and unrecognizable, pushing the image toward pure abstraction where color and tone replace representational content.
